name: python3-mitmproxy-rs
title: python3-mitmproxy-rs
description:
mitmproxy's Rust bits (Python 3)
This package contains mitmproxy's Rust bits, most notably:
- WireGuard Mode: The ability to proxy any device that can be configured as
a WireGuard client.
- Windows OS Proxy Mode: The ability to proxy arbitrary Windows
applications by name or pid.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mitmproxy-rs because mitmproxy's Rust bits (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mitmproxy-rs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mitmproxy-rs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mitmproxy-rs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
